rationale: Elec. Code §2.053 governs certification and declaration of unopposed candidates elected to office. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal.
quote: On receipt of the certification, the governing body of the political subdivision by order or ordinance shall declare each unopposed candidate elected to the office.
_note: No conflict. Elec. Code §2.053 concerns election procedures for unopposed candidates and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
